_meta.label: NEEDS REVIEW - Time-and-materials service quote; day rates for skilled labour; all fields present
_meta.test_focus: T&M service_quote: day-rate labour lines, quantities in days, delivery_date is project start

inbound_message.subject: Labour Rate Request - Electrical and PM
inbound_message.body:
Hi,

We need day rates for the following resource types for a 6-week project starting 4 August 2025:

- 2x Electricians (qualified, 18th edition) for 30 days each
- 1x Project Manager for 30 days

Please quote on a day-rate basis. Site is Bristol city centre.

Nathan Ellis
Thornbury Developments Ltd

routing_reasons: classify: request_type=service_quote - catalog match skipped, routed to human review
